title: Persistent waterlogging in Dwarka Sector 12
description: Residents report chronic waterlogging during monsoon season causing traffic disruption and health hazards. Drainage infrastructure is outdated and undersized for current population density.

title: Irregular water supply in Laxmi Nagar ward
description: Multiple households in Laxmi Nagar report water supply limited to 45 minutes per day. Tanker dependency has increased threefold over the last quarter.

title: Unfinished road construction on NH-48 service lane
description: Road reconstruction project on the NH-48 service lane near Mahipalpur has been stalled for over 120 days. Commuters face daily accidents and severe congestion.

title: Overcrowding at Rajiv Chowk metro station
description: Peak-hour overcrowding at Rajiv Chowk has led to multiple safety incidents. Platform management and crowd control measures are inadequate.

title: Illegal dumping near Yamuna floodplain
description: Industrial units are disposing untreated waste along the Yamuna floodplain in Wazirabad segment. Local residents report foul odour and contaminated groundwater.

title: Delayed pension disbursement for senior citizens
description: Over 1,200 beneficiaries in Shahdara district have not received old-age pension for three consecutive months. Helpline remains unresponsive.
